_comment: Config keys whose deviation from the approved baseline counts as a SECURITY regression (vs. a benign pending-review drift). Shared by worker-a (drift detection) and team-lead (reporting).
_updated: 2026-07-18 — added telnet/samba/ftp/ddns/aiprotection so the Attack-surface panel shows a real hardened/exposed verdict instead of 'nvram-only' (these map 1:1 to auto remediations in the action catalog; drift check is present-guarded in run_monitor so a key the device doesn't report can't false-positive)
